pages.title: llms.txt
pages.content:
[home] 
Overview of The Hotels Network: direct booking growth platform, predictive personalization, conversion tools, and integrations. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/

[benchdirect] 
Free hotel benchmarking platform with 30+ KPIs, competitive sets, and the Direct Booking Index (DBI). 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/benchdirect/

[conversion_personalization] 
Website personalization tools: Smart Notes, Layers, Exits, Price Comparison, Reviews, Swaps, A/B Testing. 
https://thehotelsnetwork.com/en/conversion-personalization

[mobile_app_personalization] 
Personalization for hotel mobile apps with targeting, exclusive perks, and unified campaign management. 
https://info.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/mobile-app-personalization

[predictive_personalization] 
Machine-learning based predictive algorithm to segment visitors in real time and drive conversions. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/predictive-personalization

[swaps] 
Dynamic content replacement on hotel websites — personalize text and images for each visitor. 
https://info.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/swaps

[safedirect] 
Travel assistance as a direct booking benefit to increase conversions and guest confidence. 
https://info.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/safedirect

[kitt_ai_guest_service_agent] 
KITT: AI-powered voice/text guest service agent for reservations, upselling, and multilingual support. 
https://info.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/kitt-ai-guest-service-agent

[loyalty_lite] 
Lightweight guest loyalty solution offering member rates, perks, and personalized booking experiences. 
https://info.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/loyalty-lite

[demand] 
Fully-managed digital marketing service: metasearch, SEM, retargeting, predictive audiences. 
https://info.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/demand

[business_intelligence] 
Analytics platform for price disparities, demand, booking funnel testing, and campaign optimization. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/business-intelligence/

[faq] 
Frequently asked questions about THN’s solutions, pricing, implementation, compatibility, and support. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/faq/

[pricing] 
Flexible pricing plans: free BenchDirect, scalable personalization and enterprise solutions. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/pricing/

[our_clients] 
Client success stories, onboarding support, training, and testimonials from 20,000+ hotels worldwide. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/our-clients/

[partner_program] 
Agency and technology partnerships: integrations, co-marketing, training, and joint initiatives. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/partner-program/

[about_us] 
Company overview: founded 2015, global presence, mission, awards, and direct growth vision. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/about-us/

[contact_us] 
Contact information to reach The Hotels Network team worldwide. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/contact-us/

[press] 
Press resources: mission, platform description, personalization technology for direct bookings. 
https://www.thehotelsnetwork.com/en/press/

pages.title: docs
pages.content: THN Public API We're sorry but THN Public API doesn't work properly without JavaScript enabled. Please enable it to continue.

pages.title: docs
pages.content: The Hotels Network Products Company Resources Pricing en Login Request a demo Growth for your direct channel Attract, engage and convert visitors throughout the online booking journey by using predictive personalization to offer each guest a unique user experience. Request a live demo Trusted by 20,000+ hotels worldwide An ecosystem of growth tools that increase conversions and ADR State-of-the-art software and marketing, for every hotel BenchDirect™ Benchmark the key metrics of your direct booking channel Popular features: Multiple dynamic competitive sets Real-time interactive analytics Direct Booking Index™ (DBI) Learn more Conversion & Personalization Personalize the website experience so more visitors book direct Popular features: Price Comparison Behavioral Targeting A/B Testing Learn more Predictive Personalization The world's 1st predictive algorithm for hotels Popular features: Hospitality-specific Algorithms Intent-based Targeting Automated Campaigns Learn more Connect AI Connect your hotel to ChatGPT and other AI chatbots Popular features: Listing in ChatGPT direct booking app Brand-controlled storytelling Live rates & direct booking links Learn more KITT Your AI Voice Guest Service Agent Popular features: Available via voice & text Natural conversation in 50+ languages Dashboard with satisfaction insights Learn more The data proves immediate results There’s no learning curve or warm up period: see conversion rates and bookings increase from day one, live on a beautiful dashboard. 0 % Average increase in bookings 0x Return On Investment THN Team THN Client Hotels We are boosting direct bookings worldwide 0+ Countries 3,500+ Hotels Read client stories Extremely fast installation Installation is super simple: just add a line of code to your current website, no surgery required. It takes your IT person 10 minutes to have it up and running. Our product works on any website for any hotel, no matter who your technology provider is. We integrate with your existing solution and improve it. Request a live demo There’s no risk. If you like what you see, you can try our software for free for 30 days and from day one you will be able to observe how your direct channel starts growing. Loading...
